# Obsidian 图谱视图不是炫技，是看知识关系

---

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzUyNTcyNDkzNg==&mid=224748...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzUyNTcyNDkzNg==&mid=2247484370&idx=1&sn=e0f10a46836332ec6669cb50667fb324&chksm=fa18ffb5cd6f76a3252d5587a4d0b649c9d309ad77146a41ffb43440491bf900758f946e6a6c&from_masonry=1&sessionid=1780976911&subscene=90&scene=132&ascene=0&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004a2a&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=WQHHpM08Ur631P7pIo+0RGlgb7qa2ntZ59H2yVPoQwnbwUVD9bhjKBJ1kctaiuSQ&wx_header=3)

![](.evernote-content/E44FFDB7-F01C-4B07-BAC1-2637DD0F9F18/C112A6A5-A8CE-49B3-95FC-C7A0817F68B0.png)![](.evernote-content/E44FFDB7-F01C-4B07-BAC1-2637DD0F9F18/F1B48155-1D92-4A5E-9911-0ABF89024F16.png)![](.evernote-content/E44FFDB7-F01C-4B07-BAC1-2637DD0F9F18/6B7BE5EC-03AE-4789-ABDB-75293BDFAB70.png)![](.evernote-content/E44FFDB7-F01C-4B07-BAC1-2637DD0F9F18/1F2502B2-88A2-4E62-8BFC-B67F4337950A.png)![](.evernote-content/E44FFDB7-F01C-4B07-BAC1-2637DD0F9F18/80FE4447-C1D8-4149-A823-A7BE6866A4E2.png)

Obsidian 图谱视图不是拿来截图炫酷的，它能帮你发现中心主题、孤立页面和隐藏关系，看清自己的知识结构。

Close
